name: Nakhon Ratchasima city center
notes: Primary civic and service core of Korat with year-round resident, office, retail, and government demand.

name: The Mall Korat
notes: Major retail and destination anchor on the western side of the urban core; strong everyday and weekend charging relevance.

name: Terminal 21 Korat
notes: Large regional mall and urban destination in the north-east side of central Korat.

name: Maharat Nakhon Ratchasima Hospital
notes: Main city hospital anchor with strong all-day recurring destination demand.

name: Bangkok Hospital Ratchasima
notes: Private hospital and service anchor on the south-west urban side near major arterial access.

name: Suranaree University of Technology
notes: Large education and research campus on the Route 304 south side with student, staff, and visitor demand.

name: Nakhon Ratchasima Railway Station
notes: Primary rail anchor in the city center and a useful urban-mobility node.

name: Nakhon Ratchasima Bus Terminal 2
notes: Intercity bus terminal and arterial-access node on the south-west side of the city.

name: Save One Night Market
notes: Large lifestyle and evening-market destination with broad local catchment and parking-based dwell time.

name: Pak Chong town center
notes: Gateway service town between Bangkok and Korat on the Mittraphap corridor with strong roadside and destination overlap.
